brand_brief: Taskrift is a focused, no-nonsense productivity tool built for individuals and small teams who want clarity without complexity. The brand feels sharp, calm, and empowering — like a quiet command centre for your work life. It targets ambitious professionals, indie hackers, and creators who value clean design and deep focus over bloated feature sets.
logo_prompt: A minimal dark-mode logo for an app called Taskrift. The icon features a sleek lightning-bolt-shaped checkmark, subtly integrated into a rounded square tile. The checkmark strokes use a smooth gradient flowing from deep purple #7C3AED to emerald green #10B981, suggesting completion and momentum. The background of the tile is #18181B with a very subtle inner glow in purple. The overall aesthetic is clean, modern SaaS — no drop shadows, no gradients on the tile itself, just precise vector strokes. The wordmark beside it uses a geometric sans-serif typeface in white, with the letter R subtly styled to echo the bolt motif. Mood: focused, professional, minimal.
icon_style: Minimal geometric checkmark-bolt fusion, purple-to-emerald gradient stroke on dark rounded tile
